summary: Issue #413 ships typed packages/ui surface compositions (Card, Dialog, Popover, Form, Table) with theme-token CSS, Vietnamese copy, a11y contracts, and Vitest coverage. Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass. Guardrails: no CRITICAL reliability, security, or client-component gaps; all 7 acceptance criteria mapped to tests.

interfaceChanges.interface: Card, InteractiveCard, Dialog, ConfirmDialog, Popover, UnavailableKpiPopover, Form, TextField, PasswordField, OtpField, FormSubmit, Table, TableEmpty
interfaceChanges.description: Adds typed surface composition families composing #412 primitives with overlay focus-trap utilities, labelled forms, and keyboard-navigable tables.
Import-boundary proof that demo can consume all #413 @juli/ui surface exports.

mappings.criterion: Each composition exists as a typed packages/ui export, built from #412's elements (no duplicated primitive logic)
Render + interaction-state tests per composition (default, hover, pressed, focus-visible, disabled, loading, error, empty — only the states that apply)
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/card.test.tsx::documents hover, pressed, and focus-visible interaction states in CSS

mappings.criterion: Dialogs/popovers implement focus trap, Escape dismissal, and outside-click dismissal per ux_principles.md
Tables and forms are keyboard-navigable with labelled inputs
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/table.test.tsx::renders labelled columns with Vietnamese copy and status badges

mappings.criterion: 44×44px minimum touch target and visible focus-visible state on every interactive composition
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/form.test.tsx::documents 44px inputs, focus-visible, and error states in CSS

mappings.criterion: Vietnamese copy where the composition renders text
mappings.test: packages/ui/src/__tests__/dialog.test.tsx::renders with aria-modal, labelled title, and Vietnamese close label

mappings.criterion: Import-boundary tests confirm these compositions are importable by apps/demo and do not import from any apps/*

recommendations: Consider extracting shared FormField shell for TextField/PasswordField to reduce duplication noted in intent-review (non-blocking).
Add dedicated focus-trap and Escape-key behavioral tests for Dialog when overlay-utils gains unit coverage.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; Guardrails found no CRITICAL reliability, security, or a11y gaps. All ACs mapped; 55/55 @juli/ui and 33/33 demo tests green.

ownerSignoff.statement: AC coverage mapped; surface composition tests and import-boundary proof verified.

reviewBasis: working tree at fixed point 8c707cc7e8bb83cc42988343cbdf31944ef78c14; spec_fidelity pass as given
